Camps and holidays • MK SPORT

Camps and holidays with activity, adventure and care

A modern offer of camps and holiday trips for children and teenagers. Sport, excursions, integration, good organization and clear information for parents — all in one place.

Safe holiday Active program Easy contact
View offers Go to registration
Safe and active holidays Well-planned trips with attractions, sports activities and staff care.
A program that keeps children engaged Excursions, integration, movement, fun and memories that stay after the trip ends.
Clear information for parents Offer, contact, documents and registration gathered in one place without chaos.

See the key information about MK SPORT in a simple and clear way.

Next trip

Countdown to: Jaroslawiec

Jaroslawiec • seaside • Turnus letni • 15/07/2026 – 24/07/2026

00 Days
00 Hours
00 Minutes

Offer

Choose the right trip for your child

Each camp has its own atmosphere, plan and character. Below are the current directions presented by MK SPORT.

Summer 2026 Jaroslawiec • seaside

Jaroslawiec

A seaside summer trip for children and teenagers full of activity, integration, relaxation and holiday fun.

  • Date: 15.07 – 24.07.2026
  • Age: 8–16 years
  • Accommodation: Holiday resort in Jaroslawiec, 3–5 person rooms
  • Meals: 3 meals a day + afternoon snack
2490 PLN
See details
Summer 2026 Masuria • Ostrow Pieckowskie

Ostrow Pieckowskie

A Masurian trip for children and teenagers focused on activity, a great atmosphere, nature and shared experiences.

  • Date: 06.08 – 15.08.2026
  • Age: 8–16 years
  • Accommodation: MazuryCamp lakeside resort
  • Meals: full board
2590 PLN
See details
Winter 2027 Poronin • winter camp

Poronin

A winter mountain trip for children and teenagers with sport, winter attractions, integration and lots of fun.

  • Date: 16.01 – 22.01.2027 and 23.01 – 29.01.2027
  • Age: 8–16 years
  • Accommodation: Guesthouse in Poronin, 3–5 person rooms
  • Meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner
1990 PLN
See details
How it works

Simple registration process step by step

A parent should immediately understand what to do next. No guessing and no searching around the whole website.

01

Choose the camp

Check the destination, key details and choose the right trip for your child.

02

Send the registration

Fill in the form on the website or contact the organizer directly.

03

Receive further details

After registration, the parent receives follow-up contact, documents and organizational details.

Documents

Important documents in one place

Parents should not search for files in messages. Everything should be clear, fast and easy to access here.

Reviews

What do parents say?

Marek K. ★★★★★

A big plus for organization and clear information before departure. The child came back very happy and is already asking about the next trip.

Anna P. ★★★★☆

A very good mix of activity, integration and rest. Also a plus for fast contact and a good atmosphere.

Tomasz W. ★★★★★

You can see that the trip is well thought out. Everything was clearly explained and the program felt properly planned.

Karolina M. ★★★★★

My daughter came back happy, full of impressions and new friendships. For me that says everything.

Paweł D. ★★★★☆

Good contact with the organizer, clear information and a sensible trip program. The whole thing makes a very good impression.

Ewa S. ★★★★★

I liked that everything was gathered in one place: offer, documents, contact and fast registration.

Marek K. ★★★★★

A big plus for organization and clear information before departure. The child came back very happy and is already asking about the next trip.

Tomasz W. ★★★★★

You can see that the trip is well thought out. Everything was clearly explained and the program felt properly planned.

My daughter came back happy, full of impressions and new friendships. For me that says everything.

Paweł D. ★★★★☆

Good contact with the organizer, clear information and a sensible trip program. The whole thing makes a very good impression.

Ewa S. ★★★★★

I liked that everything was gathered in one place: offer, documents, contact and fast registration.

Instagram

See MK SPORT on Instagram too

Stories, photos and camp atmosphere are shown best through the feed. This should feel active, fresh and more dynamic than the website itself.

◎

MK SPORT Instagram

Photos, stories and the everyday atmosphere of the trips. This section should feel alive, not static.

Open profile
FAQ

Most common questions from parents

This section should quickly answer the most basic concerns. Clear, shorter and without chaos.

How does the registration process work? +

The parent fills in the form on the website and the organizer comes back with further details, documents and organizational information.

When are payment details sent? +

Payment details are sent after the child is registered and after contact with the organizer.

Can documents be downloaded from the website? +

Yes. The most important documents are collected in one place so parents do not need to search for them in messages.

Where does the departure take place from? +

Departure cities and transport details are completed in each offer and also provided after registration.

What if I have additional questions? +

The best way is to go to the Contact page or call / write directly to the organizer.

MK SPORT

Everything a parent needs in one place

Offer, contact, documents, registration form and the key trip information. The website should feel modern, but above all clear and easy to use.
